title: Household labour force survey data package | Stats NZ
content:
## Household labour force survey data package
13 January 2021, 10:45am

## Household labour force survey (HLFS) data packages for CONZUL not on website
HLFS data packages were made for CONZUL with labour market data by extended labour force measures. These were cross-tabbed with ethnicity, age, sex, occupation, and employment status. The HLFS is the source for the official measure of employment and unemployment in New Zealand.
These are no longer the most accurate data. When updated population figures are applied (for example after a census), the weights for HLFS change and the CONZUL tables become outdated. These outdated tables can be requested.
Please contact our customised data service to discuss the best available data (email info@stats.govt.nz ).
HLFS data is on Infoshare (but for more detail a customised table can be made).
- Statistics for university staff and students 13 January 2021
